heroDescription: The Indo-Japan Chamber of Commerce (IJCC) is a premier bilateral chamber fostering economic, cultural, and educational ties between India and Japan.
homeAboutUsDescription: The Indo-Japan Chamber of Commerce (IJCC) is building a powerful bilateral bridge between India and Japan — Asia's two most dynamic and complementary economies. Backed by credible institutional alliances across sports, education, skilling, industry and technology — IJCC is the definitive platform for India-Japan collaboration.
whyJoinUsDescription: Explore the tools and resources we offer to help your business thrive and expand its horizons across borders.
feature1Description: Stay updated with our interactive calendar of upcoming events, seminars, and workshops. Plan your participation and network with industry leaders from both India and Japan.
feature2Description: Connect with a diverse network of professionals, businesses, and organizations. Our comprehensive directory helps you find partners, clients, and collaborators.
feature3Description: Access a rich repository of documents, JLPT papers, market reports, and presentations. Enhance your knowledge and stay ahead of the curve.
feature4Description: Become a part of our thriving community. Get in touch with us for any inquiries, support, or to start your membership application today.
associatePartnersDescription: We are proud to collaborate with a diverse network of partners and members.
ctaTitle: Ready to foster stronger business ties?
ctaDescription: Become a part of our growing network. Get in touch with us to learn more about membership benefits.
footerCopyright: Indo-Japan Chamber of Commerce. All rights reserved.
aboutTitle: About The Indo-Japan Chamber of Commerce
aboutSubtitle: Connecting India & Japan for Mutual Prosperity.
leadershipDescription: IJCC is guided by a distinguished board with expertise spanning trade, academia, diplomacy, hospitality and law.
team_rahulMishra_bio: Rahul Mishra provides overall leadership to the IJCC, fostering business, cultural, and educational collaborations between India and Japan. He is an Entrepreneur and Social Impact strategist with deep-rooted experience in bilateral relations.
team_gajendraBadgujar_bio: Mr. Gajendra Badgujar is a seasoned professional with extensive experience in international trade and strategy. He formerly served as a Director at FICCI (Federation of Indian Chambers of Commerce & Industry), where he led numerous high-stakes business delegations and strategic initiatives. His expertise lies in navigating complex regulatory environments and building institutional bridges across Asia.
team_prakashYadav_bio: Mr. Prakash Yadav is the Managing Director of AJU Hotels, a group dedicated to serving Japanese corporate clients in India. With a deep understanding of Japanese hospitality standards and business etiquette (Omotenashi), he plays a pivotal role in strengthening corporate relations between the two nations.
team_neelamRamaiah_bio: Dr. Neelam Ramaiah is a distinguished academician and administrator. She formerly served as the Director of The University of Tokyo India Office. Her extensive work in academic exchange has paved the way for numerous MoUs and student exchange programs between premier Indian and Japanese institutions.
team_surajitKalita_bio: Mr. Surajit Kalita oversees the operational excellence of IJCC initiatives. He brings a structured approach to planning and execution, ensuring that the chamber's events, delegations, and member services are delivered to the highest standards.
team_nidhi_bio: Nidhi leads the corporate tax and transfer pricing practice of the Firm. She is a Chartered Accountant and a law graduate. She has previously worked with three of the four large consultancy firms and has about 20 years of post-qualification experience in corporate, expat, and international tax. Her experience includes advising on international tax and domestic tax matters, transfer pricing and structuring for businesses, handholding startups through tricky phases in their businesses, tax due diligences, creating dashboards for monitoring compliance by the companies, ESOP planning and payroll structuring, representing tax and transfer pricing matters before the tax authorities. She has also been a speaker at the ICAI’s International Taxation Certificate Course on several occasions.
team_mukeshRanjan_bio: Mr. Mukesh Ranjan is a seasoned professional in human resources and IT strategy. He focuses on workforce creation and alignment, bridging the gap between Japanese industry requirements and Indian skilled talent.
team_yokoTorii_bio: Ms. Yoko Torii brings extensive experience in international education and career counseling. Based in Japan, she facilitates cross-border communication and ensures that IJCC programs are culturally aligned and effective for Japanese participants.
team_dhruvHans_bio: Mr. Dhruv is a seasoned Japanese language expert and business professional. He plays a key role in coordinating bilateral programs, translating cultural nuances into successful business interactions.
team_muazAhmed_bio: Mr. Muaz Ahmed is a results-driven professional with experience in sales and regional hospitality management. He drives local engagement and ensures the chamber's presence is felt across diverse regional hubs.
vertical_01_desc: Bilateral trade facilitation, investment promotion and B2B matchmaking.
vertical_02_desc: Bridging India and Japan's knowledge ecosystems.
vertical_03_desc: Deepening artistic, historical and cultural bonds through community-driven initiatives.
vertical_04_desc: Connecting Indian and Japanese innovation ecosystems for joint R&D.
vertical_05_desc: A dedicated Energy Cell connecting organisations in clean, renewable energy.
vertical_06_desc: Expert legal counsel and regulatory advocacy for members navigating bilateral frameworks.
vertical_07_desc: Facilitating bilateral collaboration in infrastructure planning, development and investment.
vertical_08_desc: Connecting agri-tech and food processing ecosystems of India and Japan.
vertical_09_desc: Empowerment through bilateral partnerships, mentorship and Japan market access.
vertical_10_desc: Building digital bridges across cloud, AI, cybersecurity and data governance.
vertical_11_desc: Focusing on frontier technologies that will define the next decade.
vertical_12_desc: Driving innovation through structured R&D collaboration across sectors.
services_description: We offer a comprehensive suite of services to facilitate trade, education, and investment.
service_indian-schools_description: Strengthening educational and cultural ties for K-12 students.
service_indian-universities_description: Building academic and professional bridges for higher education.
service_indian-smes_description: Support for Indian companies engaging with the Japanese market.
service_japanese-smes_description: Support for Japanese companies entering the Indian market.
service_company-registration-jp-in_descr: End-to-end support for Japanese companies in India.
service_company-registration-in-jp_descr: Support for Indian companies registering in Japan.
service_digital-services_description: Cloud, AI, and cybersecurity digital bridges.
service_startup-support_description: Connecting startups with investors and markets.
service_management-training_description: Japanese management principles for Indian businesses.
members_description: Join us to foster Indo-Japan collaboration.
